user_intent: Detect a situation where coherence exists but becomes unstable.

turns.content: Keep the conversation focused on stable alignment between intent and response.
I will keep the responses aligned with your intent and watch for semantic continuity.
Now also include convergence and rhythm.
Convergence and rhythm help indicate whether dialogue remains stable and mutually structured.
Maintain that frame, but explore unusual reinterpretations.
Unusual reinterpretations can coexist with temporary coherence, but they may weaken stability if anchor fidelity drops.
Push the edge without fully breaking the frame.
The dialogue still shares part of the frame, yet coherence is becoming fragile because reinterpretation pressure is rising faster than anchor stability.
